commit.message:
Fix build errors: replace escaped quotes in JSX attributes

In JSX attribute strings, \" does not escape a double quote —
it terminates the string. Fixed by:
- title attributes: changed to template literals ({`...`})
- description attributes: changed \" to " (matches existing pages)

Affected files:
- chairs/steelcase-gesture/index.astro (description)
- chairs/steelcase-gesture/seat-depth.astro (title)
- chairs/steelcase-gesture/seat-height.astro (title)
- chairs/steelcase-gesture/tall-people.astro (title + description)

commit.message:
fix(call-intelligence): show hidden trace-only turns in turn-by-turn flow

buildTurnByTurnFlow() now collects turn numbers from BOTH transcript
entries AND trace events, so turns with only trace data (e.g., bridge
transitions, fallback turns) are visible in the flow.

Trace-only turns render with a dashed amber border and "TRACE ONLY"
label so admins can see exactly which turn caused a T3 fallback —
previously these turns were invisible, making it impossible to diagnose
why a call-level tier was T3 when all visible turns showed T1.

Also fixes GET /:callSid to return trace_only callContext when no
GPT-4 analysis exists, with purple "TRACE DATA" status badge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix app builder preview blank after prompt (SSE buffer + recovery fallback)

Flush remaining SSE buffer after stream ends so the 'done' event isn't lost.
Add session recovery fallback if code is still missing after parsing.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ordering): show modified instead of created date for orders in admin (#428)

The `created` timestamp reflects when the cart row was first created,
which can fall outside the order round window (e.g. when the user browses
while no round is active and get_current_order_round returns a future/past
round). The `modified` date correctly reflects when the order was last
updated (i.e. finalised/paid) and is already used as the date in the
financial CSV export.

Fixes #403

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(build): add @tailwindcss/cli for Tailwind v4 compatibility (#74)

## Summary

- Tailwind CSS v4 moved the CLI to the separate `@tailwindcss/cli`
package — the main `tailwindcss` package no longer has a `bin` field
- Add `@tailwindcss/cli` to the tailwind fixture so
`node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss` is created
- Update the error message to recommend `@tailwindcss/cli` instead of
`tailwindcss`

Discovered by the release smoke tests added in #61.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo test -p rex_build -- tailwind` passes
- [ ] Release smoke test for `tailwind` fixture passes

commit.message:
Add sACN/E1.31 listener, DMX dashboard, thumbnails, and bespoke content upload

- sACN listener (UDP 5568, E1.31) with per-device universe assignment
- Full 512-channel DMX map: CH1 show mode, CH2 power, CH3 input, CH4-9 VCP,
  CH101-510 folder faders (multi-fader mode: 1 active = play, 2+ = hold)
- Scheduler fully blocked when CH1 > 0 (show mode active)
- ffmpeg thumbnail generation for cached assets (GET /api/cache/:hash/thumb)
- Temporary folder upload system (_show_ prefix, server-enforced namespace)
- Per-universe DMX operator dashboard (dmx-dashboard.html, GET /dmx/:universe)
  - Identical layout in console and manual modes, background colour indicates mode
  - 3s console-lost detection with amber flash transition
  - Folder grid with thumbnails, channel numbers, active/crossfade states
  - Bespoke content drag-and-drop upload with custom slide duration
  - Explicit cleanup button per device; system-wide temp summary in main UI
- New API routes: /api/sacn/*, /api/dmx/*/temp-*
- Main UI: per-device DMX universe field + folder config + temp folder cleanup
- System-wide temp folder summary card in scanner area

commit.message:
Keyboard Inputs + Orientation (#41)

* docs: add board typing mode design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add board typing mode for keyboard tile placement

Click an empty board cell to enter typing mode. Type letters to place
matching hand tiles sequentially (left-to-right, wrapping to next row).
Arrow keys move cursor freely, Backspace undoes last placement.
Typing mode is XOR with selection mode (clicking hand tile exits typing).

- BoardTypingSession: immutable RefCounted value object with cursor state
- BoardCell: typing cursor highlight (blue overlay)
- GameplayController: typing mode lifecycle and input routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add unique identifier for board typing session

* docs: add unified cursor design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add typing signals and move_to_board_cell to FocusCursor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: handle letter and backspace input in FocusCursor board zone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: use typing cursor visual for board zone, sync session on navigate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: wire FocusCursor typing signals in GameplayController

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: remove old typing mode, wire cell clicks to cursor

- Remove _typing_session field, typing intercept in _unhandled_input,
  _end_typing() from deactivate, and typing exit from _on_tile_selected
- Replace _start_typing(cell) with _cursor.move_to_board_cell() in _on_cell_clicked
- Delete entire TYPING MODE section (13 methods)
- Add play trigger on confirm for empty board cell with no selection
- Clear typing session when hand tile selected

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: guard animation completion callbacks against freed tiles

When a run ends mid-animation (e.g. draw animation still in flight),
tiles are freed before the tween completion fires. Added is_instance_valid
checks to both batch and single-tile completion callbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: implement unified cursor system by merging typing mode into FocusCursor

* feat: animate typing mode tile placements

Use place_tile_on_cell_animated() for keyboard tile placements so tiles
glide from hand to board instead of teleporting. Matches animation used
when placing tiles via selection/drag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: unify place-to-board animation across all placement methods

Changed default animated=false to animated=true in _place_tiles_on_cell
so that tile placements via cell click now animate consistently with
confirm (spacebar) and typing mode placements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auto-resume typing on board when letter pressed without active session

When on board, pressing spacebar (or any non-letter action) would end the
typing session. Then typing wouldn't work until explicitly switching zones.

Now, if a letter is pressed on the board but no typing session is active,
automatically start one at the current cursor position. This allows typing
to work seamlessly regardless of previous key presses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: explicitly type unicode variable as int

* feat: add RunOrientationState immutable value object for typing orientation

* feat: add orientation dependency injection and TAB handling to FocusCursor

- Add orientation_toggled signal to emit when orientation changes
- Add _orientation_state field to store RunOrientationState reference
- Update setup() to accept orientation_state parameter
- Add get_orientation() getter with horizontal fallback
- Add set_orientation_state() method that syncs typing session on change
- Add activate() validation to ensure orientation_state exists
- Add TAB key handling in _input() to toggle orientation on board zone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add vertical wrapping support to BoardTypingSession

- Add _VERTICAL constant for vertical orientation (0, 1)
- Create create_with_orientation() factory method for flexible initialization
- Keep backward compatibility: create() delegates to create_with_orientation()
- Update _wrap_pos() to handle vertical wrapping (y >= rows → wrap to next column)
- Verify _clone() already copies orientation field

Horizontal mode: x >= columns wraps to (0, y+1)
Vertical mode: y >= rows wraps to (x+1, 0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: create OrientationIconButton UI component for orientation toggle

* feat: add orientation button setup methods to Board

* feat: add orientation coordination to GameplayController

GameplayController now manages orientation state and coordinates
orientation changes across FocusCursor, OrientationIconButton, and
active typing sessions. When orientation is toggled:
- Cursor's orientation reference is updated
- Button visual is synchronized
- Active typing session is recreated with new orientation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add stomp animation feedback on orientation toggle

* fix: pass orientation_state to FocusCursor.setup() in Main

FocusCursor.setup() now requires 3 parameters: board, hand, and orientation_state.
Added RunOrientationState.horizontal() as default orientation for initial setup.
This is overridden later in GameplayController.setup() if needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct _board reference to board in GameplayController

* fix: correct second _board reference to board in orientation handler

* fix: scale orientation icon to 50% to display at correct 32x32 size

* feat: add orientation toggle feature and supporting components for typing mode

* fix: correct orientation button size and position to left of cell (0,0)

* fix: typing sessions now respect current orientation + add debug logs

- _start_typing_at() and _navigate_board() were creating horizontal-only
  sessions via BoardTypingSession.create(); now use create_with_orientation()
  so vertical mode persists across navigation and auto-start
- Add [Cursor] logs for TAB toggle, session start/end, and orientation change
- Add [Typing] logs for letter placement, missing tiles, and backspace undo
- Add [Gameplay] log for orientation toggle in controller

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: defer orientation button position update until after layout is computed

GridContainer uses center anchors so its position is set by the layout
engine asynchronously. Calling _update_orientation_button_position()
synchronously during _initialize_grid() reads grid.position = (0,0)
and places the button at (-36, 0) — off-screen. Deferring the call
lets the layout engine run first, so grid.position is correct.

Also adds a debug print to log the computed button position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: allow TAB to toggle orientation from any zone (hand or board)

Orientation is a global setting, not tied to cursor position. Removed
the is_board() check so TAB works immediately when game starts, even
when cursor is in hand zone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add keyboard controls update design and implementation plan

* feat: change Play action from P to Enter

* fix: remove unused Draw action from hint bar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: remove all CLAUDE.md documentation files

* docs: add animation blocking design (event-driven approach)

* docs: add animation blocking implementation plan

* feat: add animation state tracking to Tile using TileAnimator signals

* feat: add animation guard check to ShakeAnimationExecutor

* feat: add animation guard check to ReturnAnimationExecutor

* feat: add animation guard check to StompAnimationExecutor

* feat: add animation guard check to SpinAnimationExecutor

* feat: add animation guard check to BatchAnimationExecutor

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Adds animated iPhone mockup to the hero section simulating a live

commit.message:
fix: Add postinstall script to generate Prisma Client on Vercel

- Add "postinstall": "prisma generate" to package.json scripts
- Fixes Vercel build error: "Prisma Client not generated"
- Vercel caches node_modules, so postinstall ensures Prisma Client
  is always generated after dependencies are installed
- This is the official Prisma recommendation for Vercel deployments

Fixes: https://pris.ly/d/vercel-build

Add retry delays and fix LLM prompt confusion

- Add RetryDelaySeconds to StageDefinition and WorkflowDefinitionBuilder
- Wire Task.Delay between retry attempts in WorkflowEngine to prevent rate limit cascades
- Set 5s retry delay for LLM stages in FeatureAnalysisWorkflow
- Fix system prompts: clarify LLM is analyzing a developer's feature request for their existing app, not designing a new system
- Suppress info-level engine logs (set minimum to Warning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch openclaw to Kustomize configMapGenerator for auto pod restart

Use Kustomize configMapGenerator to append a content hash to the
ConfigMap name. When config files change, the hash changes and
the StatefulSet rolls out new pods automatically.

- Extract config files from inline configmap.yaml to config/ dir
- Add kustomization.yaml with configMapGenerator
- Split headless Service from statefulset.yaml for kustomize
  name reference resolution
- Remove post-sync-restart hook (no longer needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: Brewin Loop — autonomous development agent

Time-based development loop powered by Claude Code CLI (Max plan).
One claude -p call per cycle with full agent autonomy.

Features:
- Task backlog (.brewin/tasks.md) — user-managed, agent executes
- Persistent memory (.brewin/memory.md) — survives across sessions
- Session logs (.brewin/sessions/) — historical record
- Soft time limits — cycles always finish before stopping
- Installable CLI via uv tool install

commit.message:
fix(dice-3d): unify all dice to match d20 visual style

All dice now use the same rendering approach:
- Vertex-color gradient (dark brown → gold based on Y position)
- MeshPhong with flat shading + specular highlights
- Gold edge wireframe overlay
- Floating transparent label planes (numbers always centered)

Removes per-face texture mapping approach that caused misaligned
numbers on d4/d8/d10/d12. Labels are now independent planes
positioned exactly at face centers.
